zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Saxby於1473年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Saxby13歲，母親Elizabeth Gilbert10歲。她於1495年與Sir Richard Cave在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1531年3月30日在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Saxby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname, perhaps for someone quick to take offense and draw his sword, or for an instructor in swordsmanship, from Middle English sakespey ‘draw sword’ (Old French sacquespee, from sacque(r) ‘to draw, extract’ + espee ‘sword’).

habitational name from either of two places called Saxby (Leicestershire, Lincolnshire). The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Saxi (see Sax 3) + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’, while the Leicestershire placename may arise from Old English Seaxe ‘the Saxons’ (genitive plural Seaxna) + Old Norse bȳ, or may have the same etymology as the Lincolnshire placename.

variants.name: Sax
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Sas   2.
English: from the Middle English personal name Saxe (Old Norse Saxi, derived from sax ‘one-edged sword’).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Saxby was born in 1473, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Sir Thomas Saxby, was 13 and her mother, Elizabeth Gilbert, was 10. She married Sir Richard Cave in 1495, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 30 March 1531, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Saxby(이)가 1473년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Saxby(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gilbert(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Sir Richard Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 3월 30일 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Saxby родилась в 1473 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Saxby было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gilbert, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Cave в 1495 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 30 марта 1531 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия.
